name: Revolution Medicines, Inc.
business: Revolution Medicines, Inc. is a clinical-stage precision oncology company developing targeted therapies for cancers with RAS mutations, particularly RAS(ON) inhibitors. The company has no products approved for commercial sale and has not generated any revenue from product sales. Its product candidates are in clinical and preclinical development, including daraxonrasib, elironrasib, and zoldonrasib.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage precision oncology company, and we have only a limited operating history upon which you can evaluate our business and prospects.

catalysts.event: Initiation and completion of registrational trials including RASolute 302, RASolute 303, RASolute 304, RASolute 305, and RASolve 301
catalysts.sentence: We are evaluating certain of our product candidates in both exploratory and pivotal clinical trials, both as monotherapy and in combination regimens, including the RASolute 302, RASolute 303, RASolute 304, RASolute 305, and RASolve 301.
